overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic corporate lobby from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring sleek black interiors with red neon accents, digital Arasaka advertisements, and modern lounge areas. The camera moves through connected spaces from a well-lit entrance through dark bamboo-lined corridors to an open lounge with dramatic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lobby entrance with illuminated planters

agents.ego_description: walking through the sleek corporate lobby past black planters with red neon trim

entered.detail: rectangular black planter with red neon accent lines containing green foliage
digital screen displaying red Arasaka corporation logo on black background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic corporate lobby with glossy black marble floors and geometric white lines. Black rectangular planters with red neon accents line the path, and a digital screen displaying the Arasaka logo is visible on the left wall as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with bamboo wall gardens

events.description: passing the Arasaka car advertisement screen into a darker corridor section
turning left into the darker corridor lined with bamboo planters

agents.ego_description: turning left past the digital advertisement screen into a dimly lit corridor with wall-mounted bamboo planters

entered.detail: large digital billboard showing Arasaka vehicle advertisement with white text and graphics
tall bamboo plants in wall-mounted white rectangular planters

segments.scene_description: The camera passes a large digital advertisement for Arasaka and turns left into a darker corridor. The lighting shifts to low artificial light, with bamboo plants in white planters visible along the left wall, creating a transition from the open lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark connecting corridor with accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dim corridor toward a distant light source at the end

segments.scene_description: A long walk through a dark, narrow corridor with bamboo planters receding into the background on the left. The path is dimly lit with occasional red accent lights on the floor, leading toward a brighter lounge area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: executive lounge with decorative light installation

events.description: emerging from dark corridor into spacious lounge with red ambient lighting and tall decorative light column
approaching the white couch at the back of the lounge area

agents.ego_description: exploring the lounge area and approaching the white couch near the back wall with skylight

entered.detail: tall rectangular structure with warm yellow lights arranged in vertical strips and red base lighting
bulbous white contemporary sofa with rounded organic shape
glass railing of upper mezzanine level with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious lounge area featuring dramatic red ambient lighting and a tall decorative light column. The space includes modern white furniture, an upper mezzanine with glass railings, and a skylight visible in the ceiling. The camera moves toward a distinctive white couch at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sleek corporate interior that transitions from a bright, geometric lobby into a dim corridor and finally into a dramatic, red-lit lounge. It begins by gliding across glossy black marble floors accented with white lines and red neon planters, passing a digital Arasaka logo on the left wall. As the camera passes a large digital advertisement, it turns left and shifts into a darker, narrow corridor where the open brightness gives way to low artificial light and a row of bamboo plants in white planters. The path continues through this dimly lit passage, guided by occasional red floor accents, before the space opens up into a spacious lounge. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a high-ceilinged room with a skylight, a mezzanine with glass railings, and a tall decorative light column, as the camera moves toward a modern white couch under intense red ambient lighting.
